title: Save a valid risk calculation to Journal and verify it appears
description: Verifies a valid set of inputs calculates a position size and can be saved to the Journal where it appears as a new entry.

steps.description: Type "100" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "95" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link to go to the journal page

title: Journal shows the newly saved position size value
description: Verifies that after saving a valid calculation, the Journal displays a new entry including a position_size value.

steps.description: Type "250" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "240" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link to go to the journal page

title: Stop loss equal to entry shows invalid price distance and disables save
description: Verifies validation triggers when stop loss equals entry and prevents saving to the Journal.

steps.description: Type "100" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "100" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Verify text "Invalid price distance" is visible
Verify element "Save to Journal button (data-testid=btn-calculate)" is visible

title: Risk percent above 5% shows validation error and disables save
description: Verifies risk percent validation blocks saving when risk exceeds 5%.

steps.description: Verify text "Risk must be 5% or less" is visible
Verify element "Save to Journal button (data-testid=btn-calculate)" is visible

title: Negative capital shows validation error and disables save
description: Verifies negative capital is rejected and saving is prevented.

steps.description: Verify text "Values must not be negative" is visible
Verify element "Save to Journal button (data-testid=btn-calculate)" is visible

title: Boundary: Risk percent exactly 5% allows calculation and save
description: Verifies the maximum allowed risk percent (5%) still enables calculation and saving to the Journal.

steps.description: Type "50" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "45" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Click on the "Journal" navigation link to go to the journal page

title: Correct an invalid price distance to enable saving
description: Verifies fixing stop loss after an invalid equal-to-entry error removes the error and allows saving.

steps.description: Type "100" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "100" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
Verify text "Invalid price distance" is visible
Type "98" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")

title: Correct an over-limit risk % to re-enable saving
description: Verifies reducing risk percent from above 5% to an allowed value clears the error and permits saving.

steps.description: Verify text "Risk must be 5% or less" is visible
Type "200" into the entry price field (data-testid="input-entry")
Type "190" into the stop loss price field (data-testid="input-stoploss")
